evidence: Section 4.4 states the RF model was constructed "to calculate the permutation-based variable importance" rather than impurity importance. Section 3.7 clarifies that RF was trained on GWAS-prioritized SNPs, functioning as "a multi-step prioritization framework rather than an independent validation of association signals." Candidate genes in section 3.5 are primarily characterized by GWAS results across all five models, with RF importance serving a secondary role.
